description_long: This sculpture depicts a highly detailed, anatomically accurate male human figure in a dynamic running pose, with one leg extended behind and one arm reaching forward. The musculature and bone structure are meticulously rendered, emphasizing the tension and movement in the body. The figure is bald and stands on a simple, square pedestal base that appears to be made of the same material as the figure itself. The surface has a dark, bronze-like patina with subtle variations in tone, giving it a classic, timeless appearance. The overall finish is matte with slight sheen, highlighting the contours and anatomical features. The sculpture exudes a sense of motion and athleticism, making it a striking focal point in any urban or park setting.
description: A dark bronze-like sculpture of a running, anatomically detailed male figure on a square pedestal, capturing dynamic motion and muscular detail.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back muscles, gluteal definition, and the left leg extended backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outstretched right arm, forward-leaning torso, and the dynamic running pose.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the chest, abdominal muscles, and the expressive forward reach of the right arm.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the extended left leg, the left arm bent backward, and the overall athletic posture.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in dynamic running pose
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture is shown isolated on a plain background.
